description: You are a curriculum coordinator at Riverdale Elementary School preparing a Mathematics Curriculum Audit Report for the district school board. Using GCompris, explore the Mathematics (Numbers) section, specifically the Numeration, Arithmetic, and Measures sub-categories. Catalog every activity visible in each sub-category and interact with at least one activity from the Numeration tab and one from the Arithmetic tab to understand their pedagogical intent. Write a formal Mathematics Curriculum Audit Report to ~/Desktop/math_curriculum_audit.txt including labeled sections for each sub-category with a list of activity names and a brief educational objective for each. Login: ga / password123
